segments.text: For the director of music. A psalm of the Sons of Korah.
Clap your hands, all you nations; shout to God with cries of joy.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For the LORD Most High is awesome,
the great King over all the earth!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He chose our inheritance for us,
the pride of Jacob whom he loved.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: God has ascended amid shouts of joy,
the LORD with the sounding of trumpets.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Sing praises to God, sing praises; sing praises to our King, sing praises!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For God is the King of all the earth; sing to him a psalm of praise.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: God reigns over the nations; God is seated on his holy throne.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The nobles of the nations assemble as the people of the God of Abraham, for the kings of the earth belong to God; he is greatly exalted!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: or, voluntary of the people are gathered unto the people of the God of Abraham
